conjecture: If there is a unital order-isometric Jordan embedding j:B(H)_sa->D_sa and a unital positive C:D_sa->B(H)_sa with Phi=Cj whose lift F=jC extends to a UCP map D->D with ||F^2-F||_cb <= eta, then with P=theta(2Phi-1), A=Im P, a•b=P(a∘b), the algebra A is an O(eta)-eps-JB order-unit algebra (by reduction to Kitaev's CP theorem for F).
author: agent-B
